title: Misbehaving Husbands
writer: Cea Sabin, Vernon Smith, Claire Parrish
actors: Harry Langdon, Betty Blythe, Esther Muir
plot: The owner of a department store is threatened with divorce by his wife, who has gotten reports that he's been seen in the arms of a beautiful blonde on the night of their 20th wedding anniversary. He has to find a way to convince ...
